sys_atf_step.description: Confirm that the 'Heading <h2>: Overdue Loaner Devices' component is enabled, Page area: 'Screen content'
sys_atf_step.mugshots_cache_json: {"103950a3eec280e22eb0caa10b88dfe9":"{\"area\":\"default\",\"sn_atf_mugshot_short_description\":\"Heading <h2>: Overdue Loaner Devices\",\"inner_text\":\"Overdue Loaner Devices\",\"sn_atf_mugshot_long_description\":\"Heading <h2>: Overdue Loaner Devices\",\"methods\":[\"click\"],\"sn_atf_mugshot_label\":\"Overdue Loaner Devices\",\"version\":\"26.0\",\"sn_atf_mugshot_label_for_label_path\":\"\",\"interesting_element_path\":[\"body\",\"macroponent-f51912f4c700201072b211d4d8c26010\",\"sn-canvas-appshell-root\",\"sn-canvas-appshell-layout\",\"sn-polaris-layout\",\"sn-canvas-appshell-main\",\"sn-canvas-experience-shell\",\"macroponent-76a83a645b122010b913030a1d81c780\",\"sn-canvas-root\",\"sn-canvas-layout\",\"sn-canvas-main\",\"sn-canvas-screen\",\"screen-action-transformer-923a913b532c0110aab9ddeeff7b1243\",\"macroponent-163a913b532c0110aab9ddeeff7b1241\",\"now-uxf-page\",\"sn-dashboard\",\"data-store-provider\",\"sn-dashboard-main\",\"par-dashboard-content\",\"grid-stack-renderer\",\"component-renderer\",\"macroponent-d24d53f60350de7a652caf3188a46ed2\",\"sn-par-visualization-base\",\"sn-par-visualization-header\",\"sn-par-widget-header\",\"div\",\"now-heading\",\"h2\"],\"get_value_result\":\"Overdue Loaner Devices\",\"sn_atf_mugshot_tag_display_name\":\"Heading <h2>\",\"sn_atf_mugshot_value\":\"\",\"tag\":\"h2\",\"isDisabled\":false,\"label_path\":[\"Screen content\"],\"hash\":\"103950a3eec280e22eb0caa10b88dfe9\"}"}
